# Good Shepherd Academy - AI Assistant Information
# Website: https://educational-website-1978.netlify.app/

## About
Good Shepherd Academy is a premier educational institution established in 2005.

## Key Statistics
- Students: 2000+
- Faculty: 150+ (Ph.D. qualified)
- Courses: 5 Premium Programs
- Placement Rate: 90%
- Location: 123 Education Street, Knowledge Park, New Delhi
- Contact: +91-98765-43210

## Courses Offered
1. B.Tech Computer Science - 4 Years, 90% Placement
2. M.Sc Data Science - 2 Years, 88% Placement
3. MBA Business Management - 2 Years, 92% Placement
4. B.Tech Artificial Intelligence - 4 Years, 90% Placement
5. BBA Business Administration - 3 Years, 85% Placement

## Facilities
- Smart Classrooms with 4K Interactive Displays
- Digital Library with 50,000+ e-books
- Modern Computer Labs
- Sports Facilities
- Hostel Accommodation

## Why Choose GSA?
- 150+ Expert Faculty
- 90% Placement Record
- Industry-Aligned Curriculum
- 2000+ Strong Alumni Network
- State-of-the-Art Infrastructure
